TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Swaziland_(Eswatini), title = Swaziland_(Eswatini), year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Swaziland_(Eswatini)} }

S.FORM: Swaziland u Swaziland sa i labu nu Africa (Fey-cuo ťĚěśī≤), itiza i 26 30 S, 31 30 E.u ahebal nu lala' mapulung sa 17.364 km2.u ahebal nu lala'ay sa 17,204 km2, u ahebal nu nanumay sa 160 km2. hamin nu tademaw sa 1,451,428. kakalukan umah sa 68.30%, kilakilangan umah sa 31.70%, zumaay henay umah sa 0%. kiwkay nu Eswatini namisumad tu ku kanatalay a ngangan u "Swaziland " tu Se-waw-ti-ni wan-kuo (ŚŹ≤Áď¶ŚłĚŚįľÁéčŚúč, Kingdom of Eswatini). u Se-waw-ti-ni ku cacay a Afric (Fey-cuo ťĚěśī≤) saadidi'ay nu kanatal. Se-wati-ni Kingdom of Eswatini idai i Afric (Fey-cuo ťĚěśī≤) nu walian timulan, amis, nutipan, timulan tulu a lilisan malaup nu South Africa , walian atu Muosan-pike mababiyaw, tademaw kya cacay a lasubu cacay a bataan (110) a mang, atu Na-fa South Africa masasungaay ku sasiwbayan nuheni. Se-wati-ni cacay ku acawa nu tatama pina ku tataynaan a acawawan nu lalid nuheni. Kuo-wan nai' ku wantan tu demiad amipili'tu tatayna a kawawan, ayda nina kuowan sabaw tu lima (15) ku tataynaan a acawaw atu tulu a bataan (30) ku wawaw. tapang tusu nu kanatal u tapang tusu nu kanatal sa u Mbabane . kakinginan nu kanatal demiad kakinging nu kanatal demiad sa 6 bulad 9 demiad. tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (cong-tung) ayza sa ci Mswati III, micakat a demiad sa i 1986 a mihca 4 bulad 25 demiad. u cunli nu Swaziland ayza sa ci Themba N. Masuku, micakat a demiad sa i 2020 a mihcaan 12 bulad 13 demiad. laylay Se-wati a tademaw naw Pantu a binacadan, cacay a bataan idaw ku enem (16) a seci nu Pantu a binacadan namakayda i Africa (Fey-cuo ťĚěśī≤) nu tebang mabulaw tayda i nu timulan, sabaw tu walu (18) a seci, Sewa-cilan miliyas tu Pantu a patideng, u sakakaay ci N-sewa-ci Mswazi , nikudan a binacadan u Swati han a binacadan. cacay a malebut siwaw a lasubu idaw ku tusa (1902) a mihcaan nikudan ni kalepacawan nu Bu-Er , Se-waci-lan mala Ingkuo masimaway a kanatal. cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu enem a bataan idaw ku walu (1968) a mihcaan siwa a bulat enem a demiad misiteked. cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu pitu a bataan idaw ku tulu (1973) a mihcaan sepat a bulad misiteked sepat a balad, Suopu-ca ese milawpes tu sinfa bulasakan ku ehun, pasaluimeng ku kawaw nu centan. cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu pitu a bataan idaw ku walu a mihcaan misa baluhay tu sinfa, caay sipasiydai tu katuuday amihapu, katukuh tu tusa (1978) misabaluhay tu sian-fa caay pihapu tu tademaw, katukuh tu tusa a malebut idaw ku lima (2005) a mihcaan misa baluhay tu sian-fa . sumad sa tu kanatalay a ngangan 2018 Kingdom of Eswatini, ". tusa a malebut cacay a bataan idaw ku walu (2018) a mihcaan Sewa-cilan kuo-wan ci En-se-waw-ti san se kumihapuay tu Sewa-cilan misumad tu ngangan u Kingdom of Eswatini) , kalecad nu baluhay a kanatal nu sakalecad misumad tu tu "Sewa-tini wan-kuo" . (H.M. King Mswati III)50 "Kingdom of Eswatini". Sewa-cilan i sepat a bulad sabaw tu siwa a demiad patideng tunipi siteked tu lima a pulu atu kuo-wan ci En-se-waw-ti sakatuluay a se (śĀ©ŚŹ≤Áď¶ŚłĚšłČšłĖ H.M. King Mswati III) tu lima a pulu anilecuhan maleapi ku kawaw, ci En-se-waw-ti sakatuluay a se tini kasikawawan sakamusa Swaziland u UK (Ing-kuo ŤčĪŚúč) anipanganganan a kanatal. mihapu sa pangangan tu kanatal han u "Kingdom of Eswatini". tawya sakamusa ci En-se-waw-ti sakatuluay a se , tada mautang tu misumad tu nganga saci Swaziland , makaadih tu duma a kanatal ni pisiteked, unu niyadu'ay tu kusapangangan tu ngangan nu kanatal, sisa, mangalay cinida itini i lima a bataan , lima a bataan nu likisian, mangalay misumad tu ngangan nu kanatal u Kingdom of Eswatini han. (eSwatini), . Swaziland u ngangan inai tahekal i dadiw. i Swaziland sakatahekal nu mibunsiw idaw ku igu atu faiun a ngangan nu kanatal, nika i sasa idaw ku baluhay a ngangan u E-Swa-tini (šľäŚŹ≤Áď¶ŚłĚŚįľ(eSwatini)), amica kunika adidi' nu sulit, saka tahekal nu mibunsiw acaay tu kasumad. (Bechuanaland)śĒĻŚźćś≥Ęśú≠ťā£ŚÖĪŚíĆŚúč(Botswana),ÁĺÖŚĺ∑Ť•Ņšļě(Rhodesia) (Nyasaland)śėďŚźćť¶¨śčČŚ®ĀŚÖĪŚíĆŚúč(Malawi). Africa (Fey-cuo ťĚěśī≤) timulan a nutaw a kanatal miliyas tu mabulaway a kitidaan misiteked satu misumad tu ngangan, mahida u Pacun-nalan (Bechuanaland Ť≤ĚŚ∑ĚÁīćŤė≠) sumadeng tu Puoca- na-kunhekuo (Botswana ś≥Ęśú≠ťā£ŚÖĪŚíĆŚúč),Luode-siya (Rhodesia ÁĺÖŚĺ∑Ť•Ņšļě) mala Sinpa-wi-kunhekuo ,Niya-salan (Nyasaland ŚįľšļěŤĖ©Ťė≠) masumad tu Ma-lawi-kunhekuo (Malawi ŚíĆÁĎěŚ£ę(Switzerland), (Kingdom of eSwatini,śöęŤ≠Į). Swaziland kuo-wan ci En-se-waw-ti sakatuluay a se sakamu sa ayda, matalaw acaay ka tinengi nutaw ku Swaziland atu Switzerland u nganga nu kanatal samad han tu Kingdom of eSwatini . lalangawan atu limulak (Umhlanga, Reed Dance) Ludzidzini . Sekuo tu mihmihcaan idaw ku tusaay a angangan nu lalangawan nu lisin a kawaw, cacay han u penen a lisinan "Umhlanga" , Sekuo a limucedan tu mihcaan nu walu a bulad atu siwa a bulat mapulung i "Ludzidzini" wan-kun a putah, tusaay a demiad i putah mudadiw malimulak. ŚŹ¶šłÄÁāļŤĪźŚĻīÁ•≠ŚčáŚ£ęÁĮÄ(Incwala, the First Fruit Festival) LudzidziniÁéčŚģģŚÖßšĻčÁČßÁČõŚ†īŤąČŤ°Ć. duma u lalikid nu tatamaan a limulak "Incwala" , tu paymihcaan sabaw tusa a bulad, atu sakatusa a mihcaan tu cacay a bulad itida i "Ludzidzini" wan-kun i labu nu papakatalanan a limulak. Sekuo tu mihcaan a sepatay a bulad milimulak tu Mswati ‚ÖĘ pilecuhan, makakutay i sepatay a niyadu' malimulak, kya milihidanamin ku niyadu'ay a tademaw tu nina limulak. duma nu Sekuo a mihcaan nu walu a bulad katukuh tu siwa a bulad sikawaw tu cacay a bataan a demiad asikawaw tu kitakitay a pisiwbayan , kya katinenga nu pasa putahay numisiwbaya, kya milihida ku katuuday nikasilacan tu cancanan masaup amalimulak, nuaydaay amihcaan mala Sekuo a tademawan tu mihmihcaan a kalimulakan a kawaw.. (Royal Swazi Spa Hotel ),Lugogo Sun Hotel,ť¶ĖťÉĹŚĘ®Ś∑īśú¨ŚúįŚćÄśúČMountain Inn. niyaduay a angangan nu kalimulakan atu aidangan, Sekuo angangan nu tataydaan midang a liwkangan u Wancia taying hutin idaw ku mammalian tu adidi'ay a sanglacay a mamalian, papakiwan atu ngangaduyan tu wuncin, "Lugogo Sun Hotel", sutu Muo-papen a kitidaan idaw ku"Mountain Inn". duma nu "Mbabane Club" adidi'ay a sasalamaan tu mali atu wunciucen , tabakiay a cacakayan nu The Gables idaw kunipatidengan tu Sekuo nu aydaay a kakacuduan, angangan nu sapaadih u Amilika a kacudu. mahedek ku nakamuan. Sekuo lalimulakan caay ka yadah, labiihantu inayay ku kataydaan. Hlane,MkhayaŚŹäMlilwane (Ngwenya Glass),MagugaśįīŚ£©Á≠Č. Sekuo adidi' ku aaidangan, tada anganganan han u "Hlane", "Mkhaya" atu "Mlilwanea" tuluay kiya aadupan nu dadiputan a kitidaan atu nalimaan amisangaan tu lacik , galasuwan a kakulian (Ngwenya Glass), "Maguga" cascas sa.

**,*** km*, u ańß…ôbar~…ĺ nu nanumaj sa *** km*. ńßamin nu tad…ômaw sa *,***,***. kakar~…ĺukan umańß sa **.**%, kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan umańß sa **.**%, zumaaj ńß…ônaj umańß sa *%. kiwkaj nu …ôswatini ¶aaj ka tin…ôŇči nutaw ku swazir~…ĺand atu switz…ôrr~…ĺand u ŇčaŇča nu kanatar~…ĺ samad ńßan tu kiŇčdom of …ôswatini . r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan atu r~…ĺimur~…ĺak (umńßr~…ĺaŇča, *…ô…ôd dan ¶…ô) r~…ĺudzidzini . s…ôkuo tu mińßmińß ¶aan idaw ku tusaaj a aŇčaŇčan nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan nu r~…ĺisin a kawaw, ¶a ¶aj ńßan u p…ôn…ôn a r~…ĺisinan "umńßr~…ĺaŇča" , s…ôkuo a r~…ĺimu ¶…ôdan tu mińß ¶aan nu war~…ĺu a bur~…ĺad atu siwa a bur~…ĺat mapur~…ĺuŇč i "r~…ĺudzidzini" wan-kun a putańß, tusaaj a d…ômiad i putańß mudadiw mar~…ĺimur~…ĺak. *********(in ¶war~…ĺa, tńß…ô first fruit f…ôsti*ar~…ĺ) r~…ĺudzidzini*********. duma u r~…ĺar~…ĺikid nu tatamaan a r~…ĺimur~…ĺak "in ¶war~…ĺa" , tu pajmińß ¶aan sabaw tusa a bur~…ĺad, atu sakatusa a mińß ¶aan tu ¶a ¶aj a bur~…ĺad itida i "r~…ĺudzidzini" wan-kun i r~…ĺabu nu papakatar~…ĺanan a r~…ĺimur~…ĺak. s…ôkuo tu mińß ¶aan a s…ôpataj a bur~…ĺad mir~…ĺimur~…ĺak tu mswati * pir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan, makakutaj i s…ôpataj a nijadu Ē~ ° mar~…ĺimur~…ĺak, kja mir~…ĺińßidanamin ku nijadu Ē~ °aj a tad…ômaw tu nina r~…ĺimur~…ĺak. duma nu s…ôkuo a mińß ¶aan nu war~…ĺu a bur~…ĺad katukuńß tu siwa a bur~…ĺad sikawaw tu ¶a ¶aj a bataan a d…ômiad asikawaw tu kitakitaj a pisiwbajan , kja katin…ôŇča nu pasa putańßaj numisiwbaja, kja mir~…ĺińßida ku katuudaj nikasir~…ĺa ¶an tu ¶an ¶anan masaup amar~…ĺimur~…ĺak, nuajdaaj amińß ¶aan mar~…ĺa s…ôkuo a tad…ômawan tu mińßmińß ¶aan a kar~…ĺimur~…ĺakan a kawaw.. (*ojar~…ĺ swazi spa ńßot…ôr~…ĺ ),r~…ĺugogo sun ńßot…ôr~…ĺ,********mountain inn. nijaduaj a aŇčaŇčan nu kar~…ĺimur~…ĺakan atu aidaŇčan, s…ôkuo aŇčaŇčan nu tatajdaan midaŇč a r~…ĺiwkaŇčan u wan ¶ia tajiŇč ńßutin idaw ku mammar~…ĺian tu adidi Ē~ °aj a saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj a mamar~…ĺian, papakiwan atu ŇčaŇčadujan tu wun ¶in, "r~…ĺugogo sun ńßot…ôr~…ĺ", sutu muo-pap…ôn a kitidaan idaw ku"mountain inn". duma nu "mbaban…ô ¶r~…ĺub" adidi Ē~ °aj a sasar~…ĺamaan tu mar~…ĺi atu wun ¶iu ¶…ôn , tabakiaj a ¶a ¶akajan nu tńß…ô gabr~…ĺ…ôs idaw kunipatid…ôŇčan tu s…ôkuo nu ajdaaj a kaka ¶uduan, aŇčaŇčan nu sapaadińß u amir~…ĺika a ka ¶udu. mańß…ôd…ôk ku nakamuan. s…ôkuo r~…ĺar~…ĺimur~…ĺakan ¶aaj ka jadańß, r~…ĺabiińßantu inajaj ku katajdaan. ńßr~…ĺan…ô,mkńßaja*mr~…ĺir~…ĺwan…ô (Ňčw…ônja gr~…ĺass),maguga***. s…ôkuo adidi Ē~ ° ku aaidaŇčan, tada aŇčaŇčanan ńßan u "ńßr~…ĺan…ô", "mkńßaja" atu "mr~…ĺir~…ĺwan…ôa" tur~…ĺuaj kija aadupan nu dadiputan a kitidaan atu nar~…ĺimaan amisaŇčaan tu r~…ĺa ¶ik , gar~…ĺasuwan a kakur~…ĺian (Ňčw…ônja gr~…ĺass), "maguga" ¶as ¶as sa.
S.FORM: Swaziland u Swaziland sa i labu nu Africa (Fey-cuo ťĚěśī≤), itiza i 26 30 S, 31 30 E.u ahebal nu lala' mapulung sa 17.364 km2.u ahebal nu lala'ay sa 17,204 km2, u ahebal nu nanumay sa 160 km2. hamin nu tademaw sa 1,451,428. kakalukan umah sa 68.30%, kilakilangan umah sa 31.70%, zumaay henay umah sa 0%. kiwkay nu Eswatini namisumad tu ku kanatalay a ngangan u "Swaziland " tu Se-waw-ti-ni wan-kuo (ŚŹ≤Áď¶ŚłĚŚįľÁéčŚúč, Kingdom of Eswatini). u Se-waw-ti-ni ku cacay a Afric (Fey-cuo ťĚěśī≤) saadidi'ay nu kanatal. Se-wati-ni Kingdom of Eswatini idai i Afric (Fey-cuo ťĚěśī≤) nu walian timulan, amis, nutipan, timulan tulu a lilisan malaup nu South Africa , walian atu Muosan-pike mababiyaw, tademaw kya cacay a lasubu cacay a bataan (110) a mang, atu Na-fa South Africa masasungaay ku sasiwbayan nuheni. Se-wati-ni cacay ku acawa nu tatama pina ku tataynaan a acawawan nu lalid nuheni. Kuo-wan nai' ku wantan tu demiad amipili'tu tatayna a kawawan, ayda nina kuowan sabaw tu lima (15) ku tataynaan a acawaw atu tulu a bataan (30) ku wawaw. tapang tusu nu kanatal u tapang tusu nu kanatal sa u Mbabane . kakinginan nu kanatal demiad kakinging nu kanatal demiad sa 6 bulad 9 demiad. tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (cong-tung) ayza sa ci Mswati III, micakat a demiad sa i 1986 a mihca 4 bulad 25 demiad. u cunli nu Swaziland ayza sa ci Themba N. Masuku, micakat a demiad sa i 2020 a mihcaan 12 bulad 13 demiad. laylay Se-wati a tademaw naw Pantu a binacadan, cacay a bataan idaw ku enem (16) a seci nu Pantu a binacadan namakayda i Africa (Fey-cuo ťĚěśī≤) nu tebang mabulaw tayda i nu timulan, sabaw tu walu (18) a seci, Sewa-cilan miliyas tu Pantu a patideng, u sakakaay ci N-sewa-ci Mswazi , nikudan a binacadan u Swati han a binacadan. cacay a malebut siwaw a lasubu idaw ku tusa (1902) a mihcaan nikudan ni kalepacawan nu Bu-Er , Se-waci-lan mala Ingkuo masimaway a kanatal. cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu enem a bataan idaw ku walu (1968) a mihcaan siwa a bulat enem a demiad misiteked. cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu pitu a bataan idaw ku tulu (1973) a mihcaan sepat a bulad misiteked sepat a balad, Suopu-ca ese milawpes tu sinfa bulasakan ku ehun, pasaluimeng ku kawaw nu centan. cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu pitu a bataan idaw ku walu a mihcaan misa baluhay tu sinfa, caay sipasiydai tu katuuday amihapu, katukuh tu tusa (1978) misabaluhay tu sian-fa caay pihapu tu tademaw, katukuh tu tusa a malebut idaw ku lima (2005) a mihcaan misa baluhay tu sian-fa . sumad sa tu kanatalay a ngangan 2018 Kingdom of Eswatini, ". tusa a malebut cacay a bataan idaw ku walu (2018) a mihcaan Sewa-cilan kuo-wan ci En-se-waw-ti san se kumihapuay tu Sewa-cilan misumad tu ngangan u Kingdom of Eswatini) , kalecad nu baluhay a kanatal nu sakalecad misumad tu tu "Sewa-tini wan-kuo" . (H.M. King Mswati III)50 "Kingdom of Eswatini". Sewa-cilan i sepat a bulad sabaw tu siwa a demiad patideng tunipi siteked tu lima a pulu atu kuo-wan ci En-se-waw-ti sakatuluay a se (śĀ©ŚŹ≤Áď¶ŚłĚšłČšłĖ H.M. King Mswati III) tu lima a pulu anilecuhan maleapi ku kawaw, ci En-se-waw-ti sakatuluay a se tini kasikawawan sakamusa Swaziland u UK (Ing-kuo ŤčĪŚúč) anipanganganan a kanatal. mihapu sa pangangan tu kanatal han u "Kingdom of Eswatini". tawya sakamusa ci En-se-waw-ti sakatuluay a se , tada mautang tu misumad tu nganga saci Swaziland , makaadih tu duma a kanatal ni pisiteked, unu niyadu'ay tu kusapangangan tu ngangan nu kanatal, sisa, mangalay cinida itini i lima a bataan , lima a bataan nu likisian, mangalay misumad tu ngangan nu kanatal u Kingdom of Eswatini han. (eSwatini), . Swaziland u ngangan inai tahekal i dadiw. i Swaziland sakatahekal nu mibunsiw idaw ku igu atu faiun a ngangan nu kanatal, nika i sasa idaw ku baluhay a ngangan u E-Swa-tini (šľäŚŹ≤Áď¶ŚłĚŚįľ(eSwatini)), amica kunika adidi' nu sulit, saka tahekal nu mibunsiw acaay tu kasumad. (Bechuanaland)śĒĻŚźćś≥Ęśú≠ťā£ŚÖĪŚíĆŚúč(Botswana),ÁĺÖŚĺ∑Ť•Ņšļě(Rhodesia) (Nyasaland)śėďŚźćť¶¨śčČŚ®ĀŚÖĪŚíĆŚúč(Malawi). Africa (Fey-cuo ťĚěśī≤) timulan a nutaw a kanatal miliyas tu mabulaway a kitidaan misiteked satu misumad tu ngangan, mahida u Pacun-nalan (Bechuanaland Ť≤ĚŚ∑ĚÁīćŤė≠) sumadeng tu Puoca- na-kunhekuo (Botswana ś≥Ęśú≠ťā£ŚÖĪŚíĆŚúč),Luode-siya (Rhodesia ÁĺÖŚĺ∑Ť•Ņšļě) mala Sinpa-wi-kunhekuo ,Niya-salan (Nyasaland ŚįľšļěŤĖ©Ťė≠) masumad tu Ma-lawi-kunhekuo (Malawi ŚíĆÁĎěŚ£ę(Switzerland), (Kingdom of eSwatini,śöęŤ≠Į). Swaziland kuo-wan ci En-se-waw-ti sakatuluay a se sakamu sa ayda, matalaw acaay ka tinengi nutaw ku Swaziland atu Switzerland u nganga nu kanatal samad han tu Kingdom of eSwatini . lalangawan atu limulak (Umhlanga, Reed Dance) Ludzidzini . Sekuo tu mihmihcaan idaw ku tusaay a angangan nu lalangawan nu lisin a kawaw, cacay han u penen a lisinan "Umhlanga" , Sekuo a limucedan tu mihcaan nu walu a bulad atu siwa a bulat mapulung i "Ludzidzini" wan-kun a putah, tusaay a demiad i putah mudadiw malimulak. ŚŹ¶šłÄÁāļŤĪźŚĻīÁ•≠ŚčáŚ£ęÁĮÄ(Incwala, the First Fruit Festival) LudzidziniÁéčŚģģŚÖßšĻčÁČßÁČõŚ†īŤąČŤ°Ć. duma u lalikid nu tatamaan a limulak "Incwala" , tu paymihcaan sabaw tusa a bulad, atu sakatusa a mihcaan tu cacay a bulad itida i "Ludzidzini" wan-kun i labu nu papakatalanan a limulak. Sekuo tu mihcaan a sepatay a bulad milimulak tu Mswati ‚ÖĘ pilecuhan, makakutay i sepatay a niyadu' malimulak, kya milihidanamin ku niyadu'ay a tademaw tu nina limulak. duma nu Sekuo a mihcaan nu walu a bulad katukuh tu siwa a bulad sikawaw tu cacay a bataan a demiad asikawaw tu kitakitay a pisiwbayan , kya katinenga nu pasa putahay numisiwbaya, kya milihida ku katuuday nikasilacan tu cancanan masaup amalimulak, nuaydaay amihcaan mala Sekuo a tademawan tu mihmihcaan a kalimulakan a kawaw.. (Royal Swazi Spa Hotel ),Lugogo Sun Hotel,ť¶ĖťÉĹŚĘ®Ś∑īśú¨ŚúįŚćÄśúČMountain Inn. niyaduay a angangan nu kalimulakan atu aidangan, Sekuo angangan nu tataydaan midang a liwkangan u Wancia taying hutin idaw ku mammalian tu adidi'ay a sanglacay a mamalian, papakiwan atu ngangaduyan tu wuncin, "Lugogo Sun Hotel", sutu Muo-papen a kitidaan idaw ku"Mountain Inn". duma nu "Mbabane Club" adidi'ay a sasalamaan tu mali atu wunciucen , tabakiay a cacakayan nu The Gables idaw kunipatidengan tu Sekuo nu aydaay a kakacuduan, angangan nu sapaadih u Amilika a kacudu. mahedek ku nakamuan. Sekuo lalimulakan caay ka yadah, labiihantu inayay ku kataydaan. Hlane,MkhayaŚŹäMlilwane (Ngwenya Glass),MagugaśįīŚ£©Á≠Č. Sekuo adidi' ku aaidangan, tada anganganan han u "Hlane", "Mkhaya" atu "Mlilwanea" tuluay kiya aadupan nu dadiputan a kitidaan atu nalimaan amisangaan tu lacik , galasuwan a kakulian (Ngwenya Glass), "Maguga" cascas sa.

bur~…ĺad atu siwa a bur~…ĺat mapur~…ĺuŇč i "r~…ĺudzidzini" wan-kun a putańß, tusaaj a d…ômiad i putańß mudadiw mar~…ĺimur~…ĺak. *********(in ¶war~…ĺa, tńß…ô first fruit f…ôsti*ar~…ĺ) r~…ĺudzidzini*********. duma u r~…ĺar~…ĺikid nu tatamaan a r~…ĺimur~…ĺak "in ¶war~…ĺa" , tu pajmińß ¶aan sabaw tusa a bur~…ĺad, atu sakatusa a mińß ¶aan tu ¶a ¶aj a bur~…ĺad itida i "r~…ĺudzidzini" tu mińßmińß ¶aan a kar~…ĺimur~…ĺakan a kawaw.. (*ojar~…ĺ swazi spa ńßot…ôr~…ĺ ),r~…ĺugogo sun ńßot…ôr~…ĺ,********mountain inn. nijaduaj a aŇčaŇčan nu kar~…ĺimur~…ĺakan atu aidaŇčan, s…ôkuo aŇčaŇčan nu tatajdaan midaŇč a r~…ĺiwkaŇčan u wan ¶ia tajiŇč ńßutin idaw ku mammar~…ĺian tu adidi Ē~ °aj a saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj a mamar~…ĺian, papakiwan atu ŇčaŇčadujan tu wun ¶in, "r~…ĺugogo sun ńßot…ôr~…ĺ", sutu muo-pap…ôn a kitidaan idaw ku"mountain inn". duma nu "mbaban…ô ¶r~…ĺub" adidi Ē~ °aj a sasar~…ĺamaan tu mar~…ĺi atu wun ¶iu ¶…ôn , tabakiaj a ¶a ¶akajan nu tńß…ô gabr~…ĺ…ôs idaw kunipatid…ôŇčan tu s…ôkuo nu ajdaaj a kaka ¶uduan, aŇčaŇčan nu sapaadińß u amir~…ĺika a ka ¶udu. mańß…ôd…ôk ku nakamuan. s…ôkuo r~…ĺar~…ĺimur~…ĺakan ¶aaj ka jadańß, r~…ĺabiińßantu inajaj ku katajdaan. ńßr~…ĺan…ô,mkńßaja*mr~…ĺir~…ĺwan…ô (Ňčw…ônja gr~…ĺass),maguga***. s…ôkuo adidi Ē~ ° ku aaidaŇčan, tada aŇčaŇčanan ńßan u "ńßr~…ĺan…ô", "mkńßaja" atu "mr~…ĺir~…ĺwan…ôa" tur~…ĺuaj kija aadupan nu dadiputan a kitidaan atu nar~…ĺimaan amisaŇčaan tu r~…ĺa ¶ik , gar~…ĺasuwan a kakur~…ĺian (Ňčw…ônja gr~…ĺass), "maguga" ¶as ¶as sa.
